nl_intent: Make the image sharper and more defined
wrongness_description: Model reduced KSampler denoise from 1.0 to 0.7 thinking partial denoising preserves fine detail and sharpness. In a text-to-image context denoise=1.0 is required for full generation; lowering it introduces noise artifacts rather than sharpness. Correct fix would be a sharpening post-process node (e.g. ImageSharpen).
